texto: - A mother, a real mother with a little child, thinks day and night about the welfare of the little one in her arms. A mother knows what dangers the child will have to encounter as he grows up. She does not let the father reassure her when he makes light of things and says that the children have to find their own way.A mother worries, for she carries the burden, and she often sees much deeper than the father just where the child is in danger.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Johann Christoph Blumhardt sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “- A mother, a real mother with a little child, thinks day and night about the welfare of the litt…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, motherhood, reflexao, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: - A mother, a real mother with a little child, thinks day and night about the welfare of the little one in her arms. A mother knows what dangers the child will have to encounter as he grows up. She does not let the father reassure her when he makes light of things and says that the children have to find their own way.A mother worries, for she carries the burden, and she often sees much deeper than the father just where the child is in danger.

texto: - It is clear that we have to come down a bit from the high horse of reason on which we enjoy sitting. We have to be simple and take time to think how to make things understandable to the little ones. We have to become children again, and some find that too hard.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Johann Christoph Blumhardt sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “- It is clear that we have to come down a bit from the high horse of reason on which we enjoy sit…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, motherhood, clear, útil em momentos de reflexao.
